name: Base AI Dev Container
description: One-size-fits-all Debian trixie dev container for AI/ML development: node, python, github-cli, copilot-cli, sshd, and a curated set of CLI tools (bat, eza, fzf, ripgrep, lazygit, jq, and more).

sshdPort.description: Port to expose the sshd feature on (must match across forwardPorts, portsAttributes, and containerEnv.SSHD_PORT).
